also_known_as: ミラーナ・ヴァイントゥルーブ
biography: Milana Aleksandrovna Vayntrub (born March 8, 1987) is an American actress, comedian, and activist. Born in the Soviet Union to Jewish parents, she began her career as a child actress shortly after immigrating to the United States. She came to prominence for her appearances in AT&T television commercials as saleswoman Lily Adams from 2013 to 2016 and since 2020.
name: Milana Vayntrub
